title: Lightweight & Immersive (VR)
description: Everything for immersive VR experience, featuring numerous small enhancements for a more comfortable gameplay in Minecraft.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dgddut9puk8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# What is this build about?
If you don't have a VR headset, this is simply an optimized pack with various enhancements for Minecraft, such as a convenient NBT editor and improved F3.

If you do have a VR headset, the pack transforms into an immersive Minecraft experience with intuitive mechanics.

The pack also includes utility mods for servers, such as Pat-pat, PlasmoVoice, and EmoteCraft.
# Additional
## Java arguments
Please include in the launch arguments; this will improve optimization in VR mode.
```
-XX:+UseZGC
```
## Youtube pack!
The pack includes mods like Flashback, which simplifies content creation. There are also resource packs for Chroma Key and FreeCam for recording yourself from the side (but it's better to use Flashback).
